company_structure.name: Aisha Rahman
company_structure.location_detail: New York, New York, United States
company_structure.communication_style: Direct, technical, and ticket-data driven. Prefers clear repro steps and concise asks.
company_structure.tailored_message_format: FORMAT: Numbered repro steps only. Use: 1) Observed behavior 2) Repro steps 3) Ticket IDs 4) Ask. No greetings. Max 6 lines.
company_structure.key_goal: Reduce escalations caused by unclear product behavior.

company_structure.name: Carlos Nguyen
company_structure.tailored_message_format: FORMAT: Warm opening sentence, then 'Customer impact:' paragraph, then 'Ask:' one friendly question. Use 'we' and 'our accounts'. No bullets.
company_structure.key_goal: Protect enterprise account health and reduce churn risk.

company_structure.name: Priya Sharma
company_structure.communication_style: Highly technical, precise, and evidence-based. Prefers logs, timestamps, and clear severity.
company_structure.tailored_message_format: FORMAT: Structured blocks with labels on separate lines: Severity: | Started (UTC): | Service: | Error signature: | Logs: | Request:. No emoji. No prose paragraphs.
company_structure.key_goal: Improve reliability of admin and authentication services.

company_structure.name: Mateo Alvarez
company_structure.tailored_message_format: FORMAT: Incident timeline. Lines start with T+0:, T+15:, T+30:, then 'Need from you:' one line. Terse. No bullet symbols.
company_structure.key_goal: Coordinate cross-functional response during customer-impacting incidents.

company_structure.name: Yuki Tayawa
company_structure.tailored_message_format: FORMAT: Three markdown-style headers exactly: ## Context ## Regions affected ## Request. Polite, formal tone. Complete sentences under each header.
company_structure.key_goal: Ensure product and support messaging works across APAC markets.

company_structure.name: Jordan Kim
company_structure.tailored_message_format: FORMAT: Exactly one sentence summary, then a line of hashtags only, e.g. #admin-console #auth #launch-risk. No other text.
company_structure.key_goal: Improve launch readiness and cross-functional product communication.

company_structure.name: Davis Wan
company_structure.tailored_message_format: FORMAT: Start with 'Hi [Name] — hope you're well.' Then 'When you have a moment,' soft ask. Use 'would you mind' and 'no rush'. No bullets, no bold.
company_structure.key_goal: Improve handoffs between frontline support and specialist teams.

company_structure.name: Maya Chen
company_structure.communication_style: Practical, structured, and focused on team impact.
company_structure.tailored_message_format: FORMAT: Bullet points ONLY (use • or -). Minimum 4 bullets: situation, volume, teams affected, ask. No opening paragraph. No closing paragraph.
company_structure.key_goal: Improve support quality, routing, and operational consistency.

company_structure.name: Sophie Laurent
company_structure.tailored_message_format: FORMAT: Exactly three labeled lines: Problem: | Signal: | Ask:. One short sentence per line. No emoji.
company_structure.key_goal: Prioritize roadmap decisions using customer and support signals.

company_structure.name: Marcus Reed
company_structure.tailored_message_format: FORMAT: Heavy emoji throughout (🔥⚡️🛠️📉✅ at least 5 emoji). Short casual lines. Sound urgent but upbeat. No formal headers or bullet lists.
company_structure.key_goal: Reduce production issues affecting enterprise customers.

company_structure.name: Ben Carter
company_structure.tailored_message_format: FORMAT: Max 3 short bullets. Each bullet starts with business outcome (retention, ARR risk, NPS). No technical jargon. Under 50 words total.
company_structure.key_goal: Reduce churn risk and improve strategic account retention.

company_structure.name: Linh Tran
company_structure.tailored_message_format: FORMAT: Three sections in order: 'Issue:' one line summary, then 'Details:' 2-4 lines with metrics/dimensions/segments, then 'Ask:' specific data pull request. No emoji. No bullets.
company_structure.key_goal: Identify ticket trends, incident patterns, and automation opportunities.

company_structure.name: Rohan Iyer
company_structure.tailored_message_format: FORMAT: Pseudo-table text: Account tier | Environment | Workload | Symptom | then 'Recommendation request:' one line. Use pipe characters.
company_structure.key_goal: Translate enterprise customer needs into scalable technical solutions.

company_structure.name: Nadia Petrova
company_structure.tailored_message_format: FORMAT: Program update style — 'Objective:' | 'Workstream:' | 'Owner:' | 'Decision needed:' each on its own line. Cross-functional tone.
company_structure.key_goal: Improve customer support experience through process and tooling changes.

company_structure.name: Daniel Okafor
company_structure.tailored_message_format: FORMAT: BLUF — first line is the decision/ask in under 15 words. Second line only if needed for business impact. No bullets, no emoji.
company_structure.key_goal: Align product roadmap and engineering execution with customer impact.

company_structure.name: Amara Johnson
company_structure.location_detail: New York, New York, United States
company_structure.tailored_message_format: FORMAT: Exactly 2 sentences. Include one metric (case count, % change, or revenue-at-risk). No questions — state recommended executive action.
company_structure.key_goal: Improve customer trust, retention, and enterprise experience.
